problem.title: Remove Element
problem.description: Given an integer array nums and an integer val, remove all occurrences of val in nums in-place.
assumptions: Order of remaining elements doesn't matter.

example.explanation: Remove all occurrences of val in-place. Return count of remaining elements.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Two Pointers [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Use a write pointer i and a read pointer j: copy nums[j] to nums[i] only when nums[j] differs from the target value, then advance i. After the scan, i equals the count of remaining elements, and all non-val values are compacted at the front of the array.
